gaps.title: Add @vfx_particle_sparks / @vfx_particle_smoke as first-class VRTraitNames (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: During Phase 2 refresh of examples/interaction/physics-interaction-demo, the artist surface needed @vfx_particle_sparks and @vfx_particle_smoke as independent composable traits — e.g., emit a smoke trail from a grabbed ball without also requiring @breakable, or attach sparks to a @snappable object when it locks to the grid. constants/vfx-audio.ts defines 'vfx_particle_sparks', 'vfx_particle_smoke', 'vfx_particle_fire', etc. as string constants, but VRTraitName in types/base.ts only has the blanket 'vfx' entry. The refresh used @vfx(trigger: 'on_break', effect: 'spark_burst') as a workaround, but this collapses all particle sub-types into one trait call and prevents independent composition. Suggested API: @vfx_particle_sparks(color, intensity, radius, duration, trigger?), @vfx_particle_smoke(density, drift, color, lifetime, trigger?), etc. — mirroring the existing constant names as proper VRTraitName entries backed by compiler adapters.
